feedback.text: I would like to mention the Stop Destroying Games movement as the fight for our digital rights. The games we paid for are switched off and cancelled irreversibly. We need regulation that protects us from it. By e.g. sharing relevant files for the creation of private servers. This does not require specialised costs and games could still be purchased by consumers. It is not the only way to maintain the game, it is more and it is by far better explained on Stop Destroying Videogames.
